edgeCases: Missing centinela.toml still yields defaults with nil error — only corrupted/unreadable TOML hard-fails user commands
Hooks exit 0 on corrupted TOML and surface a single 'config warning:' line; statusline cannot carry a warning so it deliberately stays silent
ActiveWorkflows warns only on read/parse failures of existing files; evidence and roadmap JSONs still skip silently via feature-name mismatch (no spurious warnings on real .workflow/)
workflow.Load distinguishes fs.ErrNotExist (absence) from read failure (e.g. permission denied) and names the state file path in both read and parse errors
start fails before worktree provisioning and before any state file write; migrate loads config before applying any migration side effect
check-fmt.sh fails loud on offenders (stderr + exit 1) and is silent on a clean tree; gofmt itself always exits 0 so the wrapper is required
